name: pdb_proteins
description: Demonstrates parsimony's mesh-ingredient pipeline end-to-end with real protein structures. Meshes are Van der Waals surfaces generated from RCSB PDBs by scripts/pdb_to_mesh.py: 1AKI is hen egg-white lysozyme (small enzyme, ~45 Å), 1AON is GroEL, the bacterial 14-subunit chaperonin (large hollow barrel, ~200 Å). Box is 600 Å, mixing dozens of small enzymes with a handful of big chaperones.
